# QBS Global — llms.txt
# https://qbsglobal.ae

> QBS Global is a Dubai-based B2B automation and AI services company. We help UAE SMEs eliminate manual work, deploy AI agents, and build digital presence. Our product VegaMind is an embeddable AI chat widget.

## Key Pages

- Homepage (English): https://qbsglobal.ae/
- Homepage (Arabic): https://qbsglobal.ae/ar/
- Blog: https://qbsglobal.ae/blog/
- VegaMind Product: https://qbsglobal.ae/VegaMind/VM-landing.html

## Blog Articles

- Your Business Is Invisible Online: https://qbsglobal.ae/blog/B1-YourBusinessIsInvisible.html

## Services

- Business automation engineering (n8n, workflow automation, CRM integration)
- AI agent deployment (VegaMind chat widget, custom AI agents)
- Digital presence management (branding, social media, web development)
- HR automation (recruitment, onboarding, MOHRE compliance)

## Product: VegaMind

VegaMind is an AI chat widget that embeds on any website with one line of code.
Pricing: Spark (free), Orbit ($24/mo), Nova (custom enterprise).
Embed: <script src="https://qbsglobal.ae/widget/loader.js" async data-vegamind-key="YOUR_KEY"></script>

## Company

- Legal name: QBS Global FZCO
- Location: Dubai, UAE (IFZA Free Zone)
- Contact: hello@qbsglobal.ae
- Languages: English, Arabic
- Target market: UAE SMEs, Middle East B2B
